idea-plugin.name: Foxxy
idea-plugin.description:
Run the full Foxxy agent inside any JetBrains IDE (IntelliJ IDEA, PhpStorm, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, etc.).

The plugin launches the foxxy http process scoped to the current project and embeds the complete Foxxy web UI in a tool window via JCEF: chat, sessions/history, scheduler, settings (API keys), skills browser, plan mode, model & reasoning selection, and memory.

The foxxy binary is built from source and bundled with the plugin — no download step. You can point the plugin at a custom foxxy binary in Settings | Tools | Foxxy.
